content.title: Understanding Fractions
content.concept: Learning about whole and parts.
content.explanation: Fractions show us parts of a whole! 🍰 Let's share a cake! 🎂
examples: 1/2 of a cake, 1/4 of a pizza

practice_questions.q: What is half of a whole?
How many quarters make a whole?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Creating Shapes
content.concept: Learning about shapes and their nets.
content.explanation: Shapes are fun to create! Let's make cubes and cones! 🧊🎈

practice_questions.q: What shape can you make with this net?
Can you fold this net into a cone?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Understanding Numbers
content.concept: Recognizing and writing numbers up to 100.
content.explanation: Numbers are like magic symbols that help us count and measure things! Let's learn how to write and recognize numbers up to 100! 🎉

practice_questions.q: What comes after 25?
Write the number that comes before 10.

content.subject: maths
content.title: Adding Numbers
content.concept: Combining two or more numbers to find the total.
content.explanation: Addition is like putting together! If you have 🍎 2 apples and 🍎 3 apples, how many apples do you have in total? Let's find out! 🍏

practice_questions.q: What is 4 + 5?
If you have 3 candies and get 2 more, how many do you have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Subtracting Numbers
content.concept: Taking away one number from another.
content.explanation: Subtraction is like taking away! If you have 🍎 5 apples and you give 🍎 2 apples to a friend, how many apples do you have left? 🍏

practice_questions.q: What is 7 - 3?
If you have 10 balloons and 4 fly away, how many do you have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Maths Practice
content.concept: Exercises to reinforce learning.
content.explanation: Let's practice what we've learned! Solve these fun problems! 📝

practice_questions.q: What is 3 + 2?
What is 6 - 1?
If you have 🍎 4 apples and you buy 🍎 3 more, how many do you have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Understanding Whole Numbers
content.concept: Whole numbers are numbers without fractions or decimals.
content.explanation: Whole numbers start from 0 and go up like 0, 1, 2, 3... 🌟 Let's count some apples! 🍎🍎🍎 means we have 3 whole apples!

practice_questions.q: What is the smallest whole number?
Count the number of stars: ⭐⭐⭐⭐

content.subject: maths
content.title: Introduction to Fractions
content.concept: Fractions represent a part of a whole.
content.explanation: If you have a pizza 🍕 and you cut it into 4 equal pieces, each piece is a fraction of the whole pizza. If you take 1 piece, you have 1/4 of the pizza!

practice_questions.q: What fraction is 1 piece of a pizza cut into 4?
If you have 2 out of 5 candies, what fraction do you have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Exploring Shapes
content.concept: Shapes are the forms of objects around us.
content.explanation: Look around! 🏠 A house is a square, a ball is a circle ⚽, and a book is a rectangle 📚. Shapes are everywhere!

practice_questions.q: What shape is a clock?
How many sides does a triangle have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Understanding Measurement
content.concept: Measurement helps us find out how long, heavy, or much something is.
content.explanation: We can measure length with a ruler 📏, weight with a scale ⚖️, and capacity with a jug 🥤. Let's measure how tall you are!
examples: Length: 5 cm, Weight: 2 kg, Capacity: 1 liter

practice_questions.q: What tool do we use to measure length?
How do we measure weight?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Let Us Play
content.concept: Games make learning math fun!
content.explanation: Let's play a game where we count how many fruits we have! 🍌🍌🍌🍌 How many bananas are there? Let's find out together!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Why Mathematics is Fun
content.concept: Mathematics helps us understand the world around us.
content.explanation: Mathematics is like a magical tool that helps us solve problems and discover new things! 🌍✨
examples: Measuring the length of a pencil ✏️

practice_questions.q: What do you think mathematics helps us with?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Let Us Do Activities
content.concept: Engaging activities make learning fun.
content.explanation: Activities like games and puzzles help us learn math in a fun way! 🎲🧩

practice_questions.q: What is your favorite math game?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Let Us Think
content.concept: Thinking critically helps us understand math better.
content.explanation: When we think about math problems, we can find different ways to solve them! 🤔💡
examples: Finding two ways to add numbers

practice_questions.q: How can you solve this problem in two different ways?
practice_questions.a: I can add or use a number line!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Let Us Explore
content.concept: Exploration leads to discovery in math.
content.explanation: Exploring different math concepts helps us learn and discover new ideas! 🌟🔍

practice_questions.q: What did you discover while exploring math?
practice_questions.a: I found out how to measure things!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Let Us Discuss
content.concept: Talking about math helps us understand it better.
content.explanation: When we discuss math with others, we can share ideas and learn from each other! 🗣️🤝
examples: Explaining a concept to a family member

practice_questions.q: Why is it important to talk about math?
practice_questions.a: It helps us learn from each other!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Math Practice
content.concept: Practice makes perfect!
content.explanation: Let's solve some fun math problems to practice what we've learned! 📚✏️
examples: 2. How many sides does a triangle have? 🔺

practice_questions.q: What is 4 + 1?
How many corners does a square have?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Importance of Sharing Ideas
content.concept: Discussing ideas enhances learning.
content.explanation: When children talk about their ideas, they learn from each other! 💬 It's like sharing secrets that help everyone grow smarter! 🌱
examples: Child A shares how they solved a math problem, and Child B learns a new method.

practice_questions.q: Why is it important to share ideas?
practice_questions.a: It helps everyone learn and find new solutions!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Different Ways to Assess Learning
content.concept: Assessment can be fun and varied!
content.explanation: We can assess learning through games, pictures, and even by creating things! 🎨 This makes learning exciting and helps teachers understand how well we are doing! 📊
examples: Using blocks to show how many apples 🍎 are in a basket.

practice_questions.q: What are some fun ways to show what you learned?
practice_questions.a: By drawing, playing games, or making models!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Practice Makes Perfect!
content.concept: Completing tasks helps improve skills.
content.explanation: Doing tasks on paper helps you practice what you've learned! ✏️ It's like training for a race! 🏃‍♂️
examples: Solve these word problems: If you have 3 apples 🍏 and get 2 more, how many do you have?

practice_questions.q: How can you practice math at home?
practice_questions.a: By doing exercises and solving problems!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Understanding Numbers
content.concept: Numbers are used to count and measure.
content.explanation: Numbers help us count things like 🍎 apples or 🐶 dogs! Let's learn how to use them in everyday life.

practice_questions.q: How many apples do you see? 🍎🍎

content.subject: maths
content.title: Adding Numbers
content.concept: Addition means putting things together.
content.explanation: When we add, we combine two groups. For example, if you have 🍎🍎 and you get 🍎, how many do you have now? Let's find out!

practice_questions.q: What is 1 + 2?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Taking Away Numbers
content.concept: Subtraction means taking away from a group.
content.explanation: When we subtract, we remove some items. If you have 🍎🍎🍎 and you eat 🍎, how many are left? Let's see!

practice_questions.q: What is 3 - 1?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Counting Fun
content.concept: A fun way to learn counting.
content.explanation: Let's sing a rhyme to count together! 🎶
content.text:
One, two, buckle my shoe, 
Three, four, open the door, 
Five, six, pick up sticks, 
Seven, eight, lay them straight, 
Nine, ten, a big fat hen!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Math Exercises
content.concept: Practice makes perfect!
content.explanation: Let's solve some problems to get better at math! 🧠

practice_questions.q: What is 2 + 3?
What is 5 - 2?

content.subject: maths
content.title: Jaya He
content.concept: Celebration of India's unity and diversity
content.explanation: This poem is our national anthem, celebrating the beauty and strength of India. It reminds us of our rich culture and heritage. 🇮🇳

content.subject: maths
content.title: Understanding Names
content.concept: The importance of names and their meanings
content.explanation: Names are special! They tell us about our identity and culture. Just like how every person has a unique name, every place does too! 🌍
examples: My name is Riya, and it means 'singer'! 🎤

practice_questions.q: What does your name mean?
practice_questions.a: It means something special about you!

content.subject: maths
content.title: Fun with Toys
content.concept: Exploring different types of toys and their uses
content.explanation: Toys are not just fun, they help us learn! From building blocks to dolls, each toy has a purpose. 🧸🛴
examples: Blocks can be used to build tall towers! 🏗️
Dolls can help us learn about caring for others! 👶

practice_questions.q: What is your favorite toy and why?
practice_questions.a: My favorite toy is a car because I love to race!

content.subject: maths
content.title: A Special Visit
content.concept: The joy of spending time with family
content.explanation: This story is about a child who visits their grandmother and learns valuable lessons about love and family. ❤️

content.subject: maths
content.title: Learning Shapes
content.concept: Identifying and understanding different shapes
content.explanation: Shapes are all around us! From circles to squares, they help us understand the world better. 🔵🔲
examples: A window is usually a rectangle! 🪟

practice_questions.q: Can you name a shape that is round?
